## Summary

A clear one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem it solves

What gap does this address? Missing metric, unsupported backend, new LLM use case?

## Proposed solution

If proposing a new metric:
- Metric name (must follow `gen_ai.*` convention):
- Type (Counter / Histogram / Gauge):
- Unit:
- Description:
- Required labels:

## RFC impact

Does this require a change to RFC.md?
